source_or_gap: The governed model-training chapter owned optimizer identity and checkpoint state but lacked a practical and theoretical optimizer landscape, modern AdamW and Muon treatment, and a competent selection protocol.
chapter_action_policy: Deepen Governed Model Training as the exclusive owner of optimizer mechanisms and optimizer-policy qualification. Add bounded handoffs to substrate, resource, and policy-update owners without creating a standalone optimizer chapter.
merge_or_split_policy: Keep optimizer algorithms, scheduling, parameterization, full state, distributed cost, and selection inside the governed training transaction. Policy-gradient objectives remain separate; substrate and resource chapters consume bounded outputs.
boundary_decision_rationale: An optimizer's meaning depends on the same parameter groups, schedule, precision, batch arithmetic, topology, checkpoint state, and selection policy already owned by Governed Model Training. Splitting the topic would create conflicting run identities.
external_literature_need: periodic refresh of accepted primary work on practical Muon variants and distributed matrix preconditioners
independent optimizer benchmark suites with equal tuning budgets and end-to-end cost accounting
architecture-transfer evidence beyond Transformer and ResNet families
proof_or_test_backlog: implement the optimizer-policy identity extension to the Training Run Transaction schema
build reference self-tests for parameter grouping, state closure, schedule-free evaluation state, and Muon matrix/fallback routing
preregister a matched AdamW-versus-alternative comparison with equal tuning budgets, at least three seeds, complete failures, and method-specific rescue
measure quality, tokens, steps, wall time, energy, memory, communication, stability, tuning cost, transfer, and resume equivalence together
evidence_transition_precondition: exact implementation and parameter-policy identities frozen before outcomes
matched model, data, token, hardware, evaluation, and tuning opportunities
positive controls and method-specific rescue pass before negative inference
independent final evaluator and complete attempted-run denominator
required_before_drafting: completed: primary source records and passage-level public notes
completed: common mechanism taxonomy and coupled-policy identity
completed: source-scoped claims and explicit non-authorities
promotion_blockers: no local optimizer comparison has executed
no independent reproduction or cross-substrate transfer exists
no accepted evidence transition promotes the chapter core
residuals: exact executable optimizer-policy schema extension remains open
current Muon variant literature requires periodic freshness review
natural-gradient, mirror-descent, and trust-region theory receive bounded orientation rather than textbook-complete derivations
next_action: Implement the optimizer-policy schema/self-tests and execute a competent matched campaign only when the resource and evaluation gates can be satisfied; preserve the integrated reader material meanwhile.
non_claims: does not create a new chapter
does not prove any optimizer superior
does not execute or reproduce any cited experiment
does not promote a chapter-core claim
does not authorize training spend, release, deployment, or publication
